name: Spicy Green Beans (Masaledar Sem)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the green beans and cut them crosswise at 1/4 inch intervals.
2. Put the ginger and garlic into the container of an electric blender or food processor. Add 1/3 of the water and blend until fairly smooth.
3. Heat the oil in a wide, heavy saucepan over medium flame. When hot, put in the cumin seeds. Five seconds later, put in the crushed chili.
4. Pour in the ginger-garlic paste. Stir and cook for about a minute.
5. Put in the coriander. Stir a few times.
6. Add the chopped tomatoes. Stir and cook for about 2 minutes, mashing up the tomato pieces with the back of a slotted spoon as you do so.
7. Add the beans, salt, and remaining water. Bring to simmer.
8. Cover; turn heat to low and cook for about 8-10 minutes or until the beans are tender.
9. Remove the cover. Add the lemon juice, roasted cumin, and a generous amount of freshly ground pepper.
10. Turn heat up and boil away all of the liquid, stirring gently as you do so.
